name: fanji-anime-finder
description: FanJi 番剧探索 - 动漫发现 App

scripts.sync: npm run build && powershell -Command "Copy-Item index.html,manifest.json,sw.js,main.bundle.js -Destination www -Force; Copy-Item *.png -Destination www -Force; if (Test-Path www/community) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force www/community }; Copy-Item -Recurse community -Destination www/community -Force; if (Test-Path worker) { if (Test-Path www/worker) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force www/worker }; Copy-Item -Recurse worker -Destination www/worker -Force }" && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:app: npm run sync && npx cap open android
